Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 406 

REDUCED_DED 

LABEL: Plan Offers Reduced Deductible Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing in the deductible phase of the 
Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: REDUCED_DED 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
 N = No 
 9 = Not applicable 
 X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable was new in
